message:
feat(cli): add --no-tui flag, --rollback migration, expanded doctor checks, and startup refactor

New CLI flags:
- serve-http --no-tui: disable the interactive TUI and run headless,
  useful for CI/CD and environments without terminal support.
- migrate --rollback: restore the database from the latest available
  backup and exit, providing a safe recovery path after failed migrations.

Startup refactor:
- Consolidate handle_default_launch into handle_serve_http: both paths
  now share the same setup-self-heal + port-check + serve flow.
- Add apply_release_logging_defaults() with tracing-subscriber: sets up
  a compact info-level tracing subscriber (configurable via
  AM_ALLOW_DEBUG_STARTUP_LOGS env var) to suppress noisy debug output
  in production while preserving it for development.
- Simplify hook-skip logic: replace verbose conditional with concise
  no_hooks || agent_name_val.is_empty().

Doctor check expansions:
- storage_root_writable: write-probe test with permission hint on failure.
- storage_root_disk_space: warn when free space drops below 100 MB.
- storage_root_git_repo: validate archive git repos under storage root.
- storage_root_git_index_lock: detect stale index.lock files.
- guard_hooks: verify pre-commit/pre-push hook installation.
- path_order: check ~/.local/bin PATH position and detect shadowing by
  earlier PATH entries (e.g. cargo-installed binary).
- mcp_config: scan all supported MCP config files and report how many
  point to Rust vs Python vs missing entries.

Other:
- Add tracing-subscriber dependency to Cargo.toml.
- Add format_bytes_human, storage_root_write_probe, and
  discover_archive_git_repos helper functions.
- Remove trailing whitespace in clear_and_reset_everything.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -40,6 +40,7 @@ crossterm = "0.28.1"
 glob.workspace = true
 regex.workspace = true
 walkdir.workspace = true
+tracing-subscriber.workspace = true
 
 [dev-dependencies]
 similar.workspace = true
